programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flu-like symptoms of a mother and her children prove to be something more serious: thallium poisoning. After the mother's death, investigators turn their attention to finding the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Shamaia Smith disappears from a strip club in East Hartford, CT. Police consider various patrons of the club, but focus on local businessman Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are dispatched to the scene of a shooting and discover the victim's husband is one of their own: a homicide detective who says his wife accidentally shot herself in the head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Chop Kick Panda
programme.desc: A lazy panda named Zibo dreams of becoming a martial arts master but is stuck as a cleaner for a dojo. Little does he know that an evil tiger has plans to take over the kingdom and only Zibo can stop him in this fun adventure!

programme.title: Arthur 3: The War of the Two Worlds
programme.desc: With Maltazard now seven feet tall and Arthur still two inches small, our hero must find a way to grow back to his normal size and stop the Evil M once and for all, with the help of Selenia and Betameche.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Wanting to prove himself as a serious musician to Zoey, Logan inadvertently unleashes his 'sick beats' on the dream world resulting in much mayhem.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers go after their missing memories and the dream chasers try find the Never Witch's hide-out while Phil covers for them at Castle Nocturnia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers feel like they should be taking the fight to the Never Witch instead of training for R.E.M. trials. Zoey's haunted by her most painful memories and Mateo continues to only dream craft Z-Blob-related items.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Set in the past, the dream chaser duo Hannah and Beau argue while young Oz searches for Lunia.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey tries to rebuild a relationship with her estranged dad and Logan steps up his training to beat Astrid.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: A close call with the Never Witch places Mateo in the forests of Wildoria while Beau is on an adventure in the dream world with Zoey.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Zoey and Mateo are trapped in the Grim Realm while Izzie is suspicious of MadTeo's true identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn’t keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja hear of another way to learn Airjitzu - from the ghost of Sensei Yang at his haunted temple - but there’s a warning; if you are trapped in it by sunrise, you will become a ghost, too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Now that the Ninja know Airjitzu, they get briefed about how the next stage to finding the tomb is to get ‘The Sword of Sanctuary’ from Cloud Kingdom, which can only be reached from the top of the Wailing Alps.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In Cloud Kingdom, a realm where destinies are written, the Ninja must get the Sword of Sanctuary, a powerful relic that can see past the traps surrounding the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master – but tensions are high as Moro’s escape from the Cursed …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: It's déjà vu for Alan Grant as he returns to Isla Nublar and winds up stranded in the jungle during a dangerous storm with injured Simon and hero-worshipping Owen!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Owen scrambles to shut down O.O.P.S.I. before it can do real damage, while Claire and the others hunt the escaped twin dinosaurs ... only to become hunted themselves!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: O.O.P.S.I., the new artificial intelligence running the Park, goes dangerously off the rails, while a thief posing as an intern steals two eggs that contain a new species of dinosaur inside!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: From hang gliding with a Pteranodon to a high-speed game of chicken with a T-Rex, Owen and Claire are determined to deliver the dinosaurs to the new exhibit on time. But park worker Danny Nedermeyer has other plans for our duo ... and Jurassic World!

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World
programme.desc: Simon Masrani has tasked his newly hired assistant, Claire Dearing, to deliver a trio of dinosaurs to Jurassic World's new super-secret exhibit! Unfortunately, Owen Grady, the animal behaviorist Claire hired to deliver the dinosaurs, is late.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se de cuenta que el y el Noruego pueden ser padre e hijo. Pitipú es atropellado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una oda al prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional, con el humor y gran atributo para enfrentar cualquier situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego suben de peso y Jonathan tiene problemas con un bully en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego, traumado por asistir a una corrida de toros, cambia su estilo de vida. Jonathan se entera de una noticia que cambiara su vida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to free John Darcy, the leader of a liberation movement in West Africa, and end the tyrannical rule of his captor, Colonel Alex Kohler, a ruthless segregationist in the "Kitara"

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brandon Margulies explains how to play a video game. Keith David shows how the machine works. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is getting ready for the Olympic games. Lady Elaine has decided to make it snow.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folk singer Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers and sings and plays a song on a harmonica. Mister Rogers has a Neighborhood board game with the different Make-Believe Neighbors.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a daycare and sees children playing. He talks about why children need to go to day care sometimes. King Friday and Queen Sarah have to leave for a few days but Prince Tuesday does not want a babysitter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make balloons. Lady Elaine tells Prince Tuesday that King Friday and Queen Sara may not be coming back from their trip. Meanwhile, X the Owl continues his lessons from the OCS about Native Americans.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the United States Postal Service and sees how stamps are designed and made. There's a heat wave in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Neighbors do what they can to keep cool and comfortable!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a dairy farm to see how cows are milked and milk is bottled. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a contractor helps King Friday plan a budget for the pool. Neighbors decide to reduce costs by helping to dig the hole.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers has a leak in his kitchen faucet and works to fix it. In Make-Believe there are lots of different kinds of work to do to build the swimming pool. A pipe breaking in the midst of digging changes the neighbors' plans.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a grocery store. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, neighbors grapple with the dilemma of whether to replace their old pipes with new ones or build a swimming pool.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a new flying trolley comes with a message that Collette, Grandpere's granddaughter, will be coming for a visit.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of his own parents and visits Negri's Music Shop where jazz violinist John Blake and his son play music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about hobbies like reading. Collette says her hobby is taking pictures of jungle animals. Daniel questions if he has grandparents. Neighbor Aber assures him that he does.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays a recording of grandparents. He visits an aquarium. Lady Aberlin will be a trolley engineer in the Neighborhood opera. Daniel is given the part of the one who wants a granddad.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A whimsical musical story about timid Daniel Tiger who is in search of his long-lost grandfather. There's an aquarium with starfish, an old goat and a Trolley Conductor, all helping each other realize how important families are.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits an applesauce factory. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, X is waiting for his seeds to arrive. He plants the seeds, but they don't grow. He plays hide-and-seek while waiting. Mister Rogers talks about waiting.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers makes granola bags and talks about people without enough to eat. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara discusses her Food for the World hunger project. Old Goat eats the plants. Mister Rogers talks about sharing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture book of vegetables and tours a vegetable soup factory. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, seeds are growing to send food to Northwood. Daniel thinks he has a tree that grows cans of vegetable soup.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers tells viewers that there are many different kinds of food. Food for the eyes, for the ears, and for the spirit.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers that his parents sometimes had to say "no" to keep him safe. Then, King Friday says "yes" to officiating a wedding.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Germaine Vaughan shows Mister Rogers how to break dance. Chrissie Thompson, who is handicapped, visits. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Ana Platypus wants to be in the wedding but can't. Daniel is having trouble being the ring bearer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows photographs of weddings. He goes to Brockett's Bakery to make arroz con leche. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is preparing for a wedding. Daniel is nervous about his role as ring bearer and his costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pottery studio to see how Eva Kwong makes a bowl. Later, Mister Rogers talks about weddings. Betty Okonak Templeton Jones marries James Michael Jones in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: While planting a seed, Mister Rogers talks about how long it takes for plants to grow and that learning to wait is important. He also shows a video about how people make orange juice.

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Elementary

programme.title: Elementary

programme.desc: Hugo lleva a los Rugrats a un lavadero de autos, en donde los bebés se envuelven en una batalla contra Angélica. Tommy y su guía mística Sabu, cruzan el patio de los Pickles en medio de una ola de calor, para llegar a la tierra de las aguas.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés deben ayudar a Angélica a vender en su puesto de limonada, pero ella se niega a pagarles, y Susie aconseja que hagan una huelga. Carlitos y Fili se ponen vestidos para ver cómo se siente y descubren que son más frescos que los pantalones.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés visitan una feria medieval tras ser hechizados con un cuento del Abuelo. El sentido del olfato de Carlitos mejora tras visitar al médico y hacer un tratamiento especial y ahora se siente libre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlos decide que Carlitos debe usar el inodoro, así que él y los bebés entrenan a Firulais para que también lo use. Angélica toma crédito por el arte abstracto de los Rugrats y empieza ser considerada como una artista extraordinaria.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés confunden la niebla por nubes. Cynthia cae al agua durante un viaje en barco.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los bebés quieren deshacerse del fantasma que creen que vive en el colchón del abuelo. Por otro lado, la minivan de Carlota deja de funcionar mientras lleva a los bebés al concierto de los Dummi Bears.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne se entera de que en un pasado, Tio Carlos supo ser un famoso patinador y, a partir de ello, comienza a enseñarle movimientos.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid buscan una actividad que hacer juntos después de las clase, pero no encuentran nada que les vaya bien a los dos. Maria tiene, al fin, un día libre, pero Ronnie Anne debe competir con el resto de su familia para estar con ella.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid le enseñan a Adelaide sobre el Día de los Muertos para ayudarla a superar la muerte de su rana. Ronnie Anne renuncia a una tradición familiar de Halloween para asistir a una fiesta.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: La familia descubre un increíble carrito de tamales e intenta mantenerlo en secreto ante la abuela. Ronnie Anne no cree en una predicción astrológica de que el amor la encontrará, hasta que parece hacerse realidad.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne está decidida a ayudar a CJ a subirse al escenario durante un espectáculo pirata. Además, Ronnie y Sid deben decidir si utilizan el dinero de un monedero perdido que hallaron en el mercado.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: La familia intenta ayudar a Bobby a superar los nervios por los exámenes. Carl se pierde en el zoológico después de escaparse de su familia para buscar un dragón de Komodo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Durante su visita, Ronnie Anne intenta convencer a su padre de que se mude a la ciudad. Con la ayuda de Sid, formula un plan que no puede fallar.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Bobby se niega a ceder el control sobre el mercado durante su cita con Lori por motivo de su pizzaversario. Ronnie Anne se da cuenta de que ella es la única persona a la que Carlitos no imita, pero se propone conseguir que lo haga.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: A la abuela le preocupa que Ronnie Anne y Bobby quieran vivir en el nuevo apartamento de su padre para siempre. Carl organiza una casa embrujada basada en el cuento de la abuela sobre "El Cucuy" y descubre que quizás la historia no es solo ficción.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando Ronnie Anne descubre que está retrasada en las nuevas tendencias, le pide ayuda a Carlota. Bobby batalla para encontrar a Sergio después de desear que se fuera volando y nunca regresara.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Power Play
programme.desc: Sophie uses Bella's idea for a fundraising concert and presents it as her own to Rikki to gain publicity for the café. Cleo's caught in the crossfire with Kim when Samantha moves in and puts her stamp on the Sertori home.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Dark Side
programme.desc: Rikki's frustrated by the water attacks and goes to Mako Island on a full moon to confront the strange force in the Moon Pool. With Cleo and Bella delayed, Will pursues her and discovers she's been affected by the experience.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: A Magnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Cleo's introduced to Ryan, a young geophysicist who's working for Samantha. Rikki doesn't react well to Cleo consulting Ryan about the Mako rock and a fracture begins to appear in the trio.

programme.desc: Will competes in the Free-Diving Championships but afterward chooses to break from the sport and shrug off Sophie's influence on his life. Rikki sees Sophie kissing Zane at the event and breaks off their relationship.

programme.desc: Robert believes his wife may have faked her pregnancy and the miscarriage just to keep him around! Demetrius thinks Nikki is lying to him and seeing other men on the side. Nikki wants to put these accusations to rest.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Dustin openly admits to other deviant behavior in his past, but strongly denies the allegations and knows he will be in his son's life. What will the lie detector tests reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: After causing Jasmine to have 4 miscarriages, she told Steve she was through with Tyrone. But having to support herself, Jasmine went back to him. Now Jasmine believes she could be pregnant again.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Miranda says that her fiancée Charlie is guilty of cheating and taking drugs. Has he been cheating with Lisa, Miranda's worst enemy? He says that he stayed a couple of days at Lisa's house to make Miranda jealous! Can this relationship survive?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 16-year-old Desire ran away from home about a month ago. Since then the only contact she's had with her mother are random text messages telling her that she's still alive. Desire says she always risked abuse and could never confide in her mother.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Aarian miscarried two of David's children, but kept the most recent one a secret until after David's mother threw her a baby shower. Now she might be pregnant again. Then, are Josh and Jessica cheating on each other? Is their child his?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he's always staying out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn't want Earnie's ex Tenyia to stay with them just because she's the mother of his child. Is he also cheating on her?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas parejas decidieron hacer un trío que terminó en un embarazo. Ahora que los bebés han nacido, estos hombres niegan ser los padres. Hoy se verán obligados a reconocer la verdad.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estos invitados dicen que están seguros de saber quién es el padre de sus hijos, pero necesitan una prueba de ADN para comprobarlo. Ahora los resultados están a punto de descubrirse, pero ¿serán los resultados que esperaban?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Estas madres están desesperadas por encontrar a los padres desaparecidos de sus hijos. Pero estos padres que niegan que son los verdaderos padres y dicen que es imposible que lo sean.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿El prometido de Tiffany, Deon, dejó embarazada a su mejor amiga lesbiana? Después, William cree que sus 2 de sus 6 hijos con su ex-esposa Nicole no son suyos y puede ser el padre del hijo de otra mujer! ¡Nuestras pruebas de ADN nos revelan la verdad!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Don y Amy contrataron a Jessica para cuidar a su hijo, Steven. Años más tarde, Jessica dice que Steven es el padre de su hijo. Además, Marisol ha hecho 16 pruebas de ADN para encontrar al padre de su hijo. ¿La prueba número 17 será la definitiva?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de hacer 5 pruebas de ADN, Rebecca regresa con 2 hombres más para encontrar al padre de su nuevo bebé. Después, Don y su esposa se alegraron al descubrir que su hijo no era el padre del bebé de Jessica, pero ella cree que Don es el padre.

programme.desc: Luffy leans on his training to bring out the power of his Haki! Meanwhile, the children of Big Mom gather as a massive force, ready to smash Luffy and the Straw Hats. Their resentment at being embarrassed fuels their desire to get revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Katakuri are locked in a duel to end all duels! Their powers ensure that each blow could be the last! Luffy must rely on his training, let all his thoughts out, and keep pushing on! Meanwhile, Sanji is about to land at Cacao Island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's dramatic battle finally draws to a close! But even if he is able to pull out victory in the last moment, can he remember the key to escaping the Mirrorworld?!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges safely! And Pekoms' bravery ensures he and the Straw Hats have a fighting chance! But can they withstand the full force of the Big Mom Pirates? At the last moment - a surprise explodes onto the scene!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji tries his best to save himself and his captain, Luffy! But the arrival of Germa has complicated matters. Whose side do these powerful superhumans fight on? In the end, sisterly love will see Sanji saved!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Sanji are safe! But the critical moment approaches - the fate of Totto Land rests on the taste of the wedding cake! Will it be sweet release or bitter defeat? Meanwhile, a cunning pincer attack leaves the Straw Hats hopelessly trapped.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the help of the Sun Pirates, the Straw Hats see their chance to escape! And the Sun Pirates bid farewell to their former captain. Mama finally tastes the Wedding Cake and the results are positively scrumptious!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At a great cost of energy and life, the Straw Hats make it out of Totto Land. Left behind in their wake are allies and friends, and would-be lovers. As the sea opens before them, what price has been paid for their escape?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's recent exploits make their way around the world! The reputation of this mighty pirate begins to grow as all eyes look towards the Straw Hats' next move! Also - German 66 leaves an artifact behind which excites the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the royals make their way to the Reverie, the mighty Navy takes all precautions to make sure they don't fall prey to kidnappings! At the vanguard is Koby, who glimpses Luffy's exploits and remembers their shared past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A vicious pirate group led by Pinkbeard who describes himself as one of Blackbeard's affiliates attacks a town in the Kingdom of Lulucia while their king and able-bodied soldiers have gone to the Reverie. And four bizarre individuals come to help.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: At New Marineford, Sakazuki, the new Admiral of the Fleet, hears the news about Luffy and recalls the tumultuous Paramount War that haunts the Navy! That game-changing war has repercussions that last into the present!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nobles from around the world gather for the Reverie as the echoes of the Paramount War resound! Among them are Shirahoshi and her family from the Ryugu Kingdom under the sea. Meanwhile, Admiral Fujitora has a conversation with his new colleague.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Stelly, Sabo's adopted brother and now the king of the Goa Kingdom, walks up to Garp who is escorting the royal family of the Fish-Man Island, with an air of importance and something up his sleeve.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi reunites with Dalton and Dr. Kureha from the Sakura Kingdom and they share their memories of the Straw Hats with Shirahoshi and Rebecca. Meanwhile, a shadowy figure descends a long staircase at the castle in the Holyland and opens a mysterious door.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi crosses the fancy of a Celestial Dragon, and those living gods are not open to having their whims disobeyed! As she is dragged away, King Neptune comes to her rescue, risking life and limb by defying the Celestial Dragon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Emperors of the Sea, Big Mom and Kaido decide to team up against Luffy! Meanwhile, Garp hears about the wild exploits of his grandson, all while a mysterious outsider visits the highest authority in the world!

programme.desc: Beginning in Andong, the spiritual capital of Korea, Marja participates in the area’s festive masked dance ritual and learns about the local salted mackerel before getting into jjimtak, Andong’s real knockout specialty.

programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: Like an Italian with a bowl of spaghetti or tortellini, a Korean eating a heap of noodles or dumplings is a satisfied customer. In Korea, slurping is not only permitted, it’s considered a compliment to the cook.

programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: As opposed to the lean-is-better preference in America, Koreans love their pork full of fat and, incidentally, full of flavor. On this episode, Marja, her dear friend, Heather Graham, and an expert food blogger named Daniel eat classic pork barbeque.

programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: On this episode, Marja and Jean-Georges eat street food all over the peninsula, including silkworm larvae, hoddeok, sweet pancakes filled with peanuts and sugar, and Dragon’s Beard, a candy made of stretched honey and nuts.

programme.title: Kimchi Chronicles
programme.desc: The episode begins in the ethereal countryside where Marja spends a day with the Alice Waters of Korea and learns the authentic way to make kimchi as well as holiday dishes to celebrate the new year.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: The story of the greatest Roman of them all - Julius Caesar. His own memoirs guide us through his journey from bankrupt civil servant to invincible general.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: Rome’s aggressive expansion takes it toe-to-toe with another great power – Carthage. An ancient town in Tunisia brings this civilization to life. Archaeology on the sea bed off Sicily reveals the brutal naval war between the two powers.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: Rome deals with conflict at home. At Pompeii and Fidenae we discover the clues to the huge wealth that flooded the Republic – but divided society. We meet the unlikely champion of the people who brought an end to this rampant inequality.

programme.title: History Cold Case UK
programme.desc: For decades experts have remained baffled by a jumble of human bones discovered in a unique series of caves on the North York Moors, known as the Windypits.

programme.title: History Cold Case UK
programme.desc: In 2008, construction workers just beyond York's city walls uncovered 113 bodies in a mass grave. The History Cold Case team spots an incredibly rare genetic peculiarity in two of the skeletons.

programme.desc: After 57 consecutive days of heavy bombing, the city of London has a quiet night. It is now evident that the Germans have been unable to break British air defenses and their hopes that the Battle of Britain would only last a couple of weeks have faded.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hour Of Houndour

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Totodile Duel
programme.desc: Ash and Misty’s rivalry is reignited when they both try to capture a Totodile at the same time. Unable to see whose Poké Ball actually caught it, they decide a battle is the best way to decide Totodile’s new Trainer.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Hot Matches
programme.desc: When Ash hears of a virtually unbeatable Trainer nearby, he's itching to take on the challenge. But both Brock’s Vulpix and Ash’s Cyndaquil take a beating from her Skarmory, even with their type advantage! How can Ash defeat it?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Love, Totodile Style
programme.desc: Ash’s Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill’s heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Fowl Play
programme.desc: Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Forrest Grumps
programme.desc: A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Psychic Sidekicks
programme.desc: After seeing a sign in the forest warning them about mischievous Ghost-type Pokémon, our heroes reach a town whose residents use Psychic types to repel them. But soon some spooky news arrives: a giant Gengar is on the loose!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Fortune Hunters
programme.desc: A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it’s just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions

programme.title: RiffTrax: Superheroes!
programme.desc: Welcome to RiffTrax Shorts: Superheroes, three short films that teach us it takes more than tights and a cape to be a superhero. Sometimes, it takes a Mylar jumpsuit and a garbage can lid. Featuring Batman, Measuring Man, and Safety Woman!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Miami Connection
programme.desc: If you put everything about the 80s in a blender, then somehow ran that through a translator that only speaks languages from another dimension, what you'd wind up with still wouldn't be half as hilarious, weird, and oddly charming as Miami Connection.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Samurai Cop
programme.desc: Decapitations, explosions, poorly subbed in stunt doubles, mangled dialogue, prominent lion heads, and unfortunate banana hammocks abound in this extremely 80s-y 90s movie. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Alfonso Rafael Federico Sebastian for Samurai Cop!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Santa and the Ice Cream Bunny
programme.desc: What is an Ice Cream Bunny? We're not quite sure, and the movie doesn't really bother to explain. Evidently he has a fire truck with an air raid siren, and lives at a place called Pirates World.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Christmas with RiffTrax featuring Magic Christmas Tree
programme.desc: Join your hosts, Mike Nelson, Kevin Murphy, and Bill Corbett, as they exchange gifts, with vintage toy commercials. Magic Christmas Tree is a fresh slice of holiday weird, sure to bring back cherished childhood memories.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 2: Demon Bat
programme.desc: A giant demon bat is terrorizing a Mexican village! Well, it’s actual fairly normal sized, as far as bats go. It’s really no more a demon than any other bat, now that you mention it.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 3: Guy and a Goose
programme.desc: Meet Dominic. He’s in love with a goose. What’s that? You’ll be right back after you alert the authorities? We completely understand.

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 4: Man V. Monster
programme.desc: Never one to let something like “not finding the made up creature we all knew never existed in the first place” discourage him, monster hunter Richard Terry is back on the prowl again!

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 5: Animals Behaving Badly
programme.desc: No matter where you stand on weird wacky animals and the moral quality of their behavior, you’ll be happy you joined Mike, Kevin and Bill for this hilarious riff of Animals Behaving Badly!

programme.title: Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot
programme.desc: Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for another baffling snipe hunt with our favorite intrepid explorer Richard Terry in Total Riff Off Episode 6: Brazilian Bigfoot!

programme.title: Números

programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.desc: Today Bob Ross creates a fantastic southwestern mountain scene with spectacular red peaks looming over a lazy, tree-lined stream.

programme.desc: Following their secret rendezvous, Liz and Caleb find themselves on a case together, defending a soldier court-martialed for sabotaging the weapon of his superior officer. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: The firm represents an Olympic hopeful; Diane and Julius unite to track down Memo 618. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's epic adventure to the Serengeti unfolds with a once-in-a-lifetime look at the great migration of wildebeest and zebra. Then Jack encounters elephants, lions, and an African rock python and he pays a visit to a local school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wonders of the World
programme.desc: Join Jack for an epic adventure to six World Heritage sites. Tanzania’s Ngorongoro Crater, Botswana’s Okavango Delta, Australia’s Fraser Island, and stops in Gabon, Canada as well as Africa’s Victoria Falls!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On the Caribbean Island of Dominica, Jack climbs up Morne Diablotin in search of the Sisserou, the world's most endangered parrot. Jack also encounters a large Boa Constrictor, then tries to keep pace with a “mountain” chicken.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: You're Endangered, Baby
programme.desc: What does it take to save a species from extinction? Patience, education and lots of babies! Today, Jungle Jack is counting down six endangered species surviving against all odds -- one baby at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the low-lying marshes of the Okavango Delta to the deserts and grasslands, Southern Africa's landscapes are as diverse as its wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers six creatures with supreme senses, like the animal with the most powerful snout, to a creature with razor-sharp eyesight. Crocs, Elephants, Sharks, Bats, Peregrine Falcons and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an unforgettable journey from Borneo to Kuala Lampur! See how conservation work on the front lines is protecting Malaysia's unique and diverse wildlife – like adorable orangutans, slithering snakes and two species of elephants!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: In Africa, the Lion is king! This is the only place on the planet where white lions roam free. Join Jack as he searches for Big Cats and Big Adventure in the unique arid landscape of Sanbona!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and Suzi for a journey to La Paz Waterfall Gardens in Costa Rica where they meet local species, like sloths, hummingbirds, and jaguars, thriving in the rainforest.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack boards a submarine heading deep into the waters of Curacao, uncovering everything from lionfish to newly discovered species. Then Jack and the team from the Columbus Zoo work to rehabilitate coral reefs by planting baby coral in the ocean.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Australia
programme.desc: G’day mates, this countdown is heading Down Under to meet up with Australia’s rare and wonderful creatures! From dingoes and devils, to kangaroos and cassowaries, come along for an Australian odyssey as Jungle Jack counts them down to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: Today, join Jungle Jack as he counts down seven creatures so bizarre, you’ve gotta see them to believe them! The duck-billed platypus, pink dolphins, white zebra, albino alligators, and many more fascinating animals from the weird world of wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Mt. Kenya where not one, but two extinct species are about to make a comeback. Come along with Jack as he discovers how the elusive bongo antelope and the stunning white zebra are being reintroduced Into the Wild.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi discover beekeepers working to protect the forest, and Jack meets the sacred cows of Rwanda.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Cats
programme.desc: From breathtaking tigers to elusive ocelots, lightning-fast cheetahs, leaping leopards, and the rarest lions on Earth. Join Jack Hanna for this Wild Countdown featuring 10 unforgettable encounters with nature’s top cats!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Gone Fishin
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is counting down his most unbelievable big fish stories from beneath the waves!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack on this unforgettable journey as he connects with some of the selfless heroes of the animal world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: How in the world do bats find their way in the dark? How do caterpillars turn into butterflies? How long can tortoises really live? The world has questions, and Jungle Jack has answers on today’s Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack treks through the pristine Corcovado National Park in search of the elusive jaguar. On a night hike, Jack comes face-to-face with the tapir, a rainforest relative of the rhinoceros.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey down south to Florida's Everglades where he meets gators, snakes, and other creatures from the swamp.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Horse Unless of Course
programme.desc: If you thought horses were cool, just wait until you meet some of their surprising relatives! Rhinos, tapirs, donkeys, zebras and the Horse Whisperer himself!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On a camel trek in Israel, Jack learns first hand about the animal's unique physiology and important contribution to early trade. Later, Jack visits the International Camel Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family are visiting a few of the special people that are doing their part to make a difference. From protecting the world's largest land mammal to the fastest…check out the story of the Knysna Elephant Park and Cheetah Outreach Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree Huggers
programme.desc: Today’s creatures seem to defy gravity with their ease in the trees! Orangutans, gibbons, bats, sloths, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to the picturesque lands of Samburu National Reserve in Northern Kenya where he finds hope for animals like lions, gerenuk, and Cape buffalo that have been surviving through a long drought.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
